mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (session_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, content, message_type, is_read, deleted, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND is_read = 0 AND deleted = 0
